title: Marlowww Texture pack PVP & More
description: Totem of Marlowww and more PVP Features
body:
🎭 **Features**
1. ✅ Replaces Totem of Undying with Marlowww’s Skin 🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks
2. 🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and streamer swaps
3. Enchanted Glint
5. Marlows Font
6. Custom GUI
7. Custom Background
8. Custom Armor and Weapons
9. Custom End Crystals and Respawn Anchors
10. PvP Utilities
11. 🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.20+
12. Join Our Discord for Support
